seoTitle: Charra vs Cherry Gardens — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Charra and Cherry Gardens. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Charra vs Cherry Gardens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Charra and Cherry Gardens.
heading: Charra vs Cherry Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Charra, South Australia and Cherry Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Charra has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Cherry Gardens (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Charra or Cherry Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Charra has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Cherry Gardens scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Charra scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Cherry Gardens scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Charra or Cherry Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Charra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
